title: WMVE-WeaponMasterVisualEffect
description: Shows Hypixel Skyblock weapon master swing range with particles
body:
My self created mod shows weapon master swing range cone inside dungeons on Hypixel Skyblock
maded for me, friends and maybe for some mod seekers

Features
Swing Range cone particles per hit
Crit particle + sound on affected mobs

My first mod so it's very unoptimized. (Maybe)

In future maube its gonna be one of function in big mods, or Hypixel finnaly make it themself
